title: Seiko 5 Sports SRPD Series
desc: The most reliable entry point into automatic watches — proven NH36 movement, excellent parts ecosystem.

title: Invicta Pro Diver 5053
desc: NH35a-powered dive watch with a genuinely accurate 200m water resistance rating — rare at this price.

title: 14oz Heavyweight Boxy Hoodie
desc: Dropped shoulder, dense knit construction. Holds shape after repeated washes — most hoodies at this price don't.

title: Salomon Speedcross 6 Trail Shoes
desc: High-grip terrain footwear that anchors a minimalist outfit without looking purely technical.

title: UGREEN Revodok Max 13-in-1 Dock
desc: True 40Gbps Thunderbolt 4 throughput. Runs dual 4K displays without the bandwidth compromises cheaper docks make.

title: Logitech Lift Vertical Mouse
desc: A genuine ergonomic improvement, not just a marketing angle — noticeable after a few full work days.
